deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก
deposit_type_code.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

deposit_account_no.nulltext: คีย์หรือไม่คีย์ก็ได้

root.sql:
SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_deposit_account_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no) as member_name -- ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.seq_no ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.print_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as operate_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_dep_m_creditor.last_calcint_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as last_calcint_tdate ,sum(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance ) as item_deposit_balance ,sum (sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance) as deposit_balance
FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_creditor_item, sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type, sc_com_m_branch, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) /*WHERE*/ -- and (sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '10') -- and ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date = '30/06/2021' ) -- and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = '10003880' ) group by sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no -- ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.seq_no ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.print_code ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date ,sc_dep_m_creditor.last_calcint_date order by sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no
